name: coalhearth
description: CoalHearth — session warm-resume + budget-guardrail engine. Journals session state continuously so a limit-hit or crash can resume from a handoff prompt instead of a manual rebuild; a secondary advisory budget nudge (char-heuristic, best-effort) warns before a fan-out spawn when headroom is low. Honest frame: reduces limit-hit damage, does not prevent or guarantee against it. Zero-dependency, offline, no API keys.
